smoke.detail: pixi run pytest tests/test_dispatch.py -q -> 12 passed; full suite 116 passed

note: run_model validates input, refuses env_manifest=None (SOP), picks+claims GPU in the same invocation (CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES + --gpu), shells out pixi run, validates output, appends ok ledger; every failure writes a fail record and raises DispatchError.
